# suppressesIncrementalRendering

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether incremental rendering should be suppressed.

## Declaration

```swift
var suppressesIncrementalRendering: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

Pass [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] to suppress incremental rendering, or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] otherwise.
